description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, boxy chassis with a predominantly white and gray exterior, accented by metallic and black components. It is equipped with six large, rugged wheels designed for superior traction and stability on uneven surfaces, each attached to an articulated suspension system for optimal maneuverability. The vehicle has a prominent sensor mast and multiple articulated arms, suggesting advanced navigation and manipulation capabilities. Various external modules, cameras, and instruments are mounted on the body, indicating a design focused on exploration and data collection. The rear section includes a sloped compartment with visible paneling and tubing, likely for storage or specialized equipment. Its overall construction is highly technical, with exposed mechanical linkages and reinforced joints, making it suitable for challenging urban or off-road environments.
description: A six-wheeled, high-tech all-terrain vehicle with articulated arms, sensor mast, and rugged suspension, built for exploration and data collection. Its white and gray body is accented by black wheels and metallic components.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vehicle's sensor mast, articulated arm, and the symmetrical arrangement of its six wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated chassis, articulated suspension, and the full extension of the manipulator arm.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the sloped compartment, rear-mounted equipment, and the robust wheelbase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays additional external modules and the detailed structure of the suspension and wheels.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a pronounced, blocky all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and raised lugs, optimized for traction on rough and loose surfaces.
